intro: Roll Up Your Sleeves and Get Ready to Sparkle!
description:
Welcome to Home Rescue: Clean and Restore, a brand-new, relaxing hidden object adventure that brings the satisfaction of a deep clean right to your screen! 
Step into the shoes of Jane, the ambitious owner of a budding small cleaning agency. 

Your mission? 

To explore incredible, beautifully designed homes, clear out the clutter, and restore them to their former glory!
Whether you are finding misplaced items, tidying up gorgeous living spaces, or solving delightful mini-games, 
this game offers a perfectly calm and satisfying seek-and-find experience from the comfort of your own home.

Take your cleaning business to the next level with exclusive extras! 

The Collector's Edition includes:
18 Additional Bonus Locations: Keep the fun going with even more colorful rooms, unique items to find, and homes to restore.
Brain-Teasing Extras: Enjoy 3 extra Mini-Games and 18 additional puzzles designed to delight true fans of the genre!

Are you ready to grab your cleaning supplies and make these incredible homes shine? 
Join Jane's agency and play Home Rescue: Clean and Restore Collector's Edition today!
